title: Tighten false-negative summary prompt/checker after empirical miss
description: Address empirical miss from provider-full-openai-gpt54-mini-budgetcontract-005 by clarifying false_negative_feedback_summary fixture field guidance (item_id/pattern/comment) and adding non-empty representative_item_id validation in harness checks/tests.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented and verified fix for empirical false_negative_feedback_summary miss. Changes: (1) task prompt now explicitly states feedback row fields item_id/pattern/comment and how to derive representative_item_id, (2) expected_outcome now requires non-empty label and representative_item_id, (3) harness structured_summary checker enforces non-empty configured fields, (4) added tests for prompt field clarity and non-empty representative_item_id rejection. Verification: python -m pytest spikes/runtime-mcp-validation/test_harness_report.py; python -m ruff check spikes/runtime-mcp-validation/harness.py spikes/runtime-mcp-validation/test_harness_report.py; empirical rerun readiness-gpt54mini-fn-summary-promptfix-001 (pass); full rerun provider-full-openai-gpt54-mini-budgetcontract-006 (15/15 first-try passes).
